examples.input: 30x50 north facing plot, 2BHK, car parking, staircase, modular kitchen, 2 toilets

layoutLogic: Master bedroom at rear/private side with attached toilet.
Staircase on side/front corner for future floor access.

examples.input: 20x40 east facing 1BHK rental house with stair and parking

layoutLogic: Compact parking at east/front if feasible.
Living at front connected to kitchen.
Staircase side-positioned for independent upper floor access.

examples.input: 40x60 west facing 3BHK premium home with pooja, utility, parking and garden

layoutLogic: Parking and entry at west/front with shading.
Master bedroom in private zone with attached toilet.
Two bedrooms with attached/common toilet strategy.
Garden/open space placed based on setbacks and light.
